mapper.sql: id, title, notice_type, level, status, publish_time, expire_time, TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createTime
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, notice_type, level, status, publish_time, expire_time, TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createTime FROM sys_notice_info WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_notice_info SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, notice_type = #{noticeType}, level = #{level}, status = #{status}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_notice_info SET status = 2 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = 0
